name: Potato & Salmon Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1 can (7 1/2 ounces) salmon, drained and boned
1 tablespoon grated lemon peel or 1 tablespoon lemon juice
1/2 cup Idaho instant mashed potato granules
recipeInstructions:
1. In a microwave-safe 2-quart casserole, combine salmon, broth, milk, green onions, red pepper, lemon peel and pepper.
2. Cover loosely with plastic wrap; cook on High for 5 to 6 minutes or until very hot.
3. Stir in potatoes.
4. Re-cover; let stand for 5 minutes.
5. Cook on High for 2 more minutes if necessary to reheat.
